title: Learn Samkhya Darshan - Shikshanam | Learn Sanskrit Online
description: Join our enlightening Samkhya Darshan Course and master all 72 Samkhya Karikas of Ishwar Krishna. Learn about the origin of the universe through the 25 elements, including Purusha and Prakriti, understand the nature of sufferings and how to overcome them, and explore the 3 Gunas and their role in creation.

courseInfo.title: Samkhya Philosophy through Samkhya Karika
courseInfo.description: वैदिक सांख्य का ज्ञान वैज्ञानिक दृष्टिकोण से ! To help you understand how our universe and we came into existence, and what the way out of all the miseries is!

sections.title: Chapter 1: On the Nature of Suffering
Chapter 6: The Union of Prakriti and Purusha
Chapter 8: The Composition of Subtle Body
Chapter 11: Objective Evolution from Primary Elements
Chapter 14: Teacher-Disciple Tradition in Samkhya Philosophy

features: पुरुष, प्रकृति आदि सांख्य के 25 तत्वों का सम्पूर्ण ज्ञान होगा।
सृष्टि में अपने अस्तित्व को समझने की बौद्धिक क्षमता मिलेगी।
सत, रज, तम गुणों पर आधारित गीता का ज्ञान सुलभ होगा ।
सांसरिक प्रपंचों के ज्ञान से जीवन भय-मुक्त होगा ।
